creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Incredible new Mexican spot serving a dish you can’t find anywhere else in London 🌮🇲🇽 ad This is @maizgroup, a fiery new restaurant serving delicious tacos (we got the mushroom tacos, and we’ve heard their birria tacos are also super popular) as well as Pozole, and it’s London’s only dedicated Pozoleria!

The food is proper authentic with two Mexican chefs, and they have amazing veggie options as well as a huge gluten free range. Don’t miss their drinks and their corn cake to end with too! 🌽 

📍58 Peckham Rye, London SE15 4JR
SHARE this with someone who would love to go!

transcription.text: Apparently there's a place in London that does a Mexican dish that no other place in London does. And it's some of the most authentic Mexican food you can get here. So let's go and check it out. This is May's in Peckham and they do some delicious tacos, authentic chilaquiles, which is a really popular brunch dish in Mexico, and the dish that you can't find anywhere else in London, pozole, a hearty Mexican stew made from large dried corn kernels. It's a rich broth garnished with fresh toppings like shredded lettuce, radishes and onion. Guys, it is worth making a trip to Peckham just for this dish. But they also do some incredible drinks. I mean, just look at the colour of this one. They have loads of veggie, vegan and gluten-free options too. It's honestly one of the best Mexican places we've tried in London. Make sure you check it out and share it with someone who would love to go.
